The Teal Mask Pokédex

The expansion pass to Pokémon Scarlet & Violet, The Hidden Treasure of Area Zero, adds several new Pokémon as well as old favourites. They may be transferred in from Pokémon Home without buying the DLC, however the pass is required to catch them in-game, and of course to play the new storyline.

The Teal Mask is the first part, released on September 13th 2023. It takes place in the land of Kitakami which is visited on a school trip. In this region a Festival of Masks is occurring and there are new mysteries to uncover.

All the Pokémon in the regional Kitakami Pokédex are listed below.

See the Blueberry Pokédex for the second part of the DLC (The Indigo Disk), or the Scarlet/Violet Pokédex for the base game.

Spinarak
Bug · Poison
